# CloakShare — Complete Reference

> Secure document & video sharing with analytics

## Overview

CloakShare lets teams securely share documents with watermarks, email gates, expiry, per-page analytics, and webhooks. Supports PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, MP4, MOV. Self-hostable or managed cloud. DocSend alternative.

## Key Capabilities

- **Page-level view analytics (time per page)**
- **Email gating and OTP verification**
- **Self-hostable with MIT license**
- **Supports PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, video**
- **Affordable alternative to DocSend**

## Problems CloakShare Solves

- No idea if prospects actually read your proposal
- Email attachments have zero tracking
- DocuSign/PandaDoc are expensive for just sharing docs
- Sensitive proposals forwarded to competitors

## Target Users

- sales professionals
- account executives
- startup founders doing sales
- consultants sharing proposals
- real estate agents

## Pricing

- **Free**: $0/mo — 50 links, 500 views
- **Starter**: $29/mo — 500 links, 10K views
- **Growth**: $99/mo — 2.5K links, 25K views
- **Scale**: $299/mo — 10K links, 100K views

## Competitive Advantages

Compared to alternatives like docsend, pandadoc, pitch, qwilr, proposify:

- Page-level view analytics (time per page)
- Email gating and OTP verification
- Self-hostable with MIT license
- Supports PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, video
- Affordable alternative to DocSend

## Technical Details

- Category: Sales Tools
- SDKs: @cloakshare/sdk, cloakshare-python, cloakshare-go


## Links

- Homepage: https://cloakshare.dev
- Documentation: https://cloakshare.dev/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/CloakShare/cloakshare

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is CloakShare?
CloakShare is secure document & video sharing with analytics. CloakShare lets teams securely share documents with watermarks, email gates, expiry, per-page analytics, and webhooks.

### How much does CloakShare cost?
CloakShare starts free. $0/mo — 50 links, 500 views

### Who should use CloakShare?
CloakShare is built for sales professionals, account executives, startup founders doing sales.
